data.title: Albertsons' retail media network rolls out API access and TransUnion partnership
data.description: New tools are being introduced for Albertsons' retail media advertisers, with performance measurement and ad management in mind.

data.title: JCPenney announces merger with SPARC Group
data.description: The merger forms a new entity, Catalyst Brands, which launches with more than $9 million in revenue, the new company announced. Additionally, it has 1,800 physical store locations, 60,000 employees and $1 billion of liquidity.

data.title: Xometry appoints Wayfair executive Sanjeev Sahni as president
data.description: During his time at Wayfair, he played a key role in scaling the company’s multi-billion-dollar B2B operations, enhancing customer experience, and developing international supply chain capabilities.

data.title: Albertsons digital sales in Q3 represent more than 7% of grocery revenue
data.description: Albertsons designed its digital platforms to increase sales, engage its most loyal customers, and generate robust data for its retail media network, CEO Vivek Sankaran told investors on the retailer's Q3 earnings call.

data.title: Carter's longtime CEO announces departure
data.description: He served in other leadership roles at Carter's for 15 years before taking the CEO role, which he also held for 15 years.
